title: HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions:
HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions!
